title: Distinct Rabbits 32x
description: A Faithful 32x add-on providing a better distinction between white rabbits and Killer Bunnies
body:
This pack is an add-on for [Faithful 32x](https://faithfulpack.net). The use of Faithful (or other vanilla-like 32x textures packs) is not required but recommended.

Distinct Rabbits provides you with a higher chance of surviving if you should ever encounter a white rabbit without knowing whether or not it's The Killer Bunny of Caerbannog preparing an attack on you.

Using this pack, white rabbits will appear with blue eyes, whereas killer bunnies will have red paws.

There is now also a [version for Bedrock](https://github.com/thisisthedogtor/addons/blob/main/distinct-rabbits/Distinct+Rabbits+32x+v.119-1+PE.mcpack?raw=true). Due to the lack of killer bunnies in Bedrock, the pack only changes the appearance of white rabbits.
